headline: Two Sides of the "Gift of Life" From DaVita Teammates
summary: NORTHAMPTON, MA / ACCESS Newswire / May 28, 2026 / Experiencing kidney disease can change one's entire perspective on life, and for some it can spark a mission to help others navigate that same journey. As we reflect on the impact of organ donation, ...

headline: DaVita and Arcosa have been highlighted as Zacks Bull and Bear of the Day
summary: DaVita is highlighted as Zacks Bull of the Day, while Arcosa faces pressure from weakening earnings revisions.

raw.headline: DaVita and Arcosa have been highlighted as Zacks Bull and Bear of the Day

headline: Bull of the Day: DaVita Inc. (DVA)
summary: DaVita has soared over 70% in 2026 to new highs. The dialysis services giant is projected to double its EPS between 2023 and 2027. Even though it's up 3,000% in the past 25 years, DVA trades at value stock levels.
